First heading is h3, should start with h1

Start your heading structure with h1

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4>Seil langs Norges vakre kyst nordover under midnattssolen til Svalbard om sommeren</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="styles_header__DntZi" role="navigation"><div class="styles_container__qETIW" role="none"><a href="/nb-no" target=""><span class="styles_hiddenText__7gdWZ">Hurtigruten</span><svg fill="none
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

MODERATE

<nav class="styles_header__DntZi" role="navigation"><div class="styles_container__qETIW" role="none"><a href="/nb-no" target=""><span class="styles_hiddenText__7gdWZ">Hurtigruten</span><svg fill="none

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select class="styles_selectStyle__UTtq4"><option value="GLOBAL">Global<!-- --> </option><option value="AU">Australia<!-- --> </option><option value="DK">Danmark<!-- --> </option><option value="FR">Fr
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="styles_header__DntZi" role="navigation"><div class="styles_container__qETIW" role="none"><a href="/nb-no" target=""><span class="styles_hiddenText__7gdWZ">Hurtigruten</span><svg fill="none

MODERATE

MODERATE

Add controls attribute or provide custom accessible controls

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select class="styles_selectStyle__UTtq4"><option value="GLOBAL">Global<!-- --> </option><option value="AU">Australia<!-- --> </option><option value="DK">Danmark<!-- --> </option><option value="FR">Fr
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'icon-selector' appears 111 times

id="icon-selector"
Each ID must be unique on the page

SERIOUS

id="voyage-highlight-card"

SERIOUS

id="carousel-card"

1.2.2 Teksting (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.2.2 (1.2.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Video has no captions track

<video class="styles_video___xFT9"></video>
Add <track kind='captions' src='captions.vtt' srclang='nb' label='Norsk'>
1.4.2 Styring av lyd (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.4.2 (1.4.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

<video class="styles_video___xFT9"></video>
Add controls attribute or provide custom accessible controls
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.hurtigruten.com/metrics/ns.html?id=GTM-M54LLMGR" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="styles_header__DntZi" role="navigation"><div class="styles_container__qETIW" role="none"><a href="/nb-no" target=""><span class="styles_hiddenText__7gdWZ">Hurtigruten</span><svg fill="none
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select class="styles_selectStyle__UTtq4"><option value="GLOBAL">Global<!-- --> </option><option value="AU">Australia<!-- --> </option><option value="DK">Danmark<!-- --> </option><option value="FR">Fr
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'categories' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input name="categories" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="styles_header__DntZi styles_fixed__hxYy0" role="navigation"><div class="styles_container__qETIW" role="none"><a href="/nb-no" target=""><span class="styles_hiddenText__7gdWZ">Hurtigruten</
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="styles_header__DntZi styles_fixed__hxYy0" role="navigation"><div class="styles_container__qETIW" role="none"><a href="/nb-no" target=""><span class="styles_hiddenText__7gdWZ">Hurtigruten</
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

List contains non-li elements: ['a', 'a', 'a']

<ul><a href="tel:+4775987781">+4775987781</a><a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#72101d1d191b1c15321a0700061b15000706171c5c111d1f"><span class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="afcdc0c0c4c6c1c8efc7dadddbc
List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4>Reis fra Oslo til Nordkapp på et all inclusive vintercruise under nordlyset</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="styles_header__DntZi" role="navigation"><div class="styles_container__qETIW" role="none"><a href="/nb-no" target=""><span class="styles_hiddenText__7gdWZ">Hurtigruten</span><svg fill="none
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="styles_header__DntZi" role="navigation"><div class="styles_container__qETIW" role="none"><a href="/nb-no" target=""><span class="styles_hiddenText__7gdWZ">Hurtigruten</span><svg fill="none
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

List contains non-li elements: ['a', 'a', 'a']

<ul><a href="tel:+4775987781">+4775987781</a><a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#11737e7e7a787f7651796463657876636465747f3f727e7c"><span class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="1c7e73737775727b5c74696e687
List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select class="styles_selectStyle__UTtq4"><option value="GLOBAL">Global<!-- --> </option><option value="AU">Australia<!-- --> </option><option value="DK">Danmark<!-- --> </option><option value="FR">Fr
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>

SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'icon-selector' appears 56 times

id="icon-selector"
Each ID must be unique on the page

SERIOUS

id="voyage-highlight-card"

SERIOUS

id="carousel-card"

1.2.2 Teksting (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.2.2 (1.2.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Video has no captions track

<video class="styles_video___xFT9"></video>
Add <track kind='captions' src='captions.vtt' srclang='nb' label='Norsk'>
1.4.2 Styring av lyd (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.4.2 (1.4.2 - Nivå A)

<video class="styles_video___xFT9"></video>

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://hurtigruten.no --max-pages 21 --format html
